title: lathyrus austriacus
intro: Lathyrus austriacus, also known as the Austrian pea or Austrian pea vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus austriacus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
